mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_basic_settings ( system_name, system_version, system_id, system_description, deployment_mode, theme_color, custom_color, layout, table_density, language, theme_mode, animation_enabled, default_homepage, default_project_view, default_page_size, time_format, auto_save, show_welcome_page, remember_tabs, session_timeout, max_failures, lockout_duration, two_factor_auth, ip_restriction, password_policy, data_retention, backup_strategy, log_level, log_path, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{systemName}, #{systemVersion}, #{systemId}, #{systemDescription}, #{deploymentMode}, #{themeColor}, #{customColor}, #{layout}, #{tableDensity}, #{language}, #{themeMode}, #{animationEnabled}, #{defaultHomepage}, #{defaultProjectView}, #{defaultPageSize}, #{timeFormat}, #{autoSave}, #{showWelcomePage}, #{rememberTabs}, #{sessionTimeout}, #{maxFailures}, #{lockoutDuration}, #{twoFactorAuth}, #{ipRestriction}, #{passwordPolicy}, #{dataRetention}, #{backupStrategy}, #{logLevel}, #{logPath}, NOW(), NOW() )
